touches.ai_summary: Inbound request from Maria Friedman, VP of CS at DynamicStack. Interested in exploring call recording and coaching solutions for their CS team. Currently evaluating options including Fathom.
next_steps: Send follow-up email with calendar link

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with meeting availability and brief overview of call recording capabilities. Maria responded confirming interest and booked discovery call for next week.

questions_asked.question: Do you integrate with our existing tech stack (Intercom, Salesforce)?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with both platforms

touches.ai_summary: 18-minute discovery call with Maria. Discussed current CS team size (11 reps), pain points around coaching consistency and call visibility. Maria mentioned they're also looking at Fathom. Focused on understanding workflow and integration needs. No other stakeholders mentioned.

questions_asked.question: Walk me through your current coaching process for new CS hires
questions_asked.answer: Mostly ad-hoc, managers listen to calls when they have time but there's no systematic approach

questions_asked.question: How does your pricing compare to Fathom for 11 users?
questions_asked.answer: Our unlimited automation tier would be $9,800 annually, I can send detailed comparison

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this decision?
questions_asked.answer: I handle CS tools and budget, I can move forward on this

objections: Need to see how this compares to Fathom before moving forward

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email with Fathom comparison deck and demo video. Maria responded asking about implementation timeline and whether the quoted price includes all features for unlimited automation tier.

questions_asked.question: If we move forward, how long does implementation typically take?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 1-2 weeks for full rollout with your team size

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up on pricing. Maria mentioned budget constraints and asked if there's flexibility on the annual price. Indicated Fathom quoted lower. Discussed discount options to move deal forward this quarter.

questions_asked.question: Is there any room to work with us on price given our team size?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with leadership and get back to you with our best offer

touches.ai_summary: Sent revised proposal at $9,800 (20.6% discount from list) to meet Maria's budget. She confirmed this works and will move forward with procurement. Discussed contract review timeline and kick-off logistics.
